MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for settlement conference this day.
Judge Pro Temp: Arnold W. Evje II, Clerk: Carmen Li, Court Reporter: June Leathely.
Plaintiff: Catholic Charities of the Archdiocese represented by Carole S. Cullum.
Defendant: Rich Eagle present in pro per.
Counsel and parties met in chambers, case settled, not reported. Trial date vacated.
